title: rosa × dumetorum var. sphaerocarpa
intro: Rosa × dumetorum var. sphaerocarpa, also known as the wild rose, is a perennial shrub that belongs to the Rosaceae family. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory qualities, which are attributed to the presence of essential oils and flavonoids. The health benefits of Rosa × dumetorum var. sphaerocarpa include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and promote skin health, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. The plant is commonly prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health conditions.
